channel.title: Morning Score
channel.description: Delivered every Monday by 10 a.m., Weekly Score is your guide to the year-round campaign cycle.

item.title: Takeaways from the latest FEC drop
item.description: Score spent the weekend digging into the top storylines from the March monthly FEC filings.
item.dc:creator: By Andrew Howard

item.title: The VA redistricting fight is heating up
item.description: With early voting ongoing, both campaigns have ramped up their operations in a big way over the past week.
item.dc:creator: By Andrew Howard

item.title: Indies and Dems risk splitting tickets in deep-red Senate races
item.description: Montana is the most likely place where these tensions could boost the GOP.
item.dc:creator: By Andrew Howard

item.title: Reading last night’s tea leaves
item.description: Sen. John Cornyn overperformed expectations on Tuesday in his bitter, incredibly expensive primary against Attorney General Ken Paxton.
item.dc:creator: By Andrew Howard

item.title: This House Democrat may lose her primary over past support for Israel
item.description: Rep. Valerie Foushee's (D-N.C.) primary is putting a spotlight on the shifting politics of Israel within the party.
item.dc:creator: By Elena Schneider and Andrew Howard
item.dc:contributor: By Elena Schneider and Andrew Howard

item.title: Trump's SOTU test
item.description: President Donald Trump’s State of the Union address offers a prime-time opportunity to shore up key parts of the voter coalition that powered his return to office — but it could also exacerbate simmering fault lines within it.
item.dc:creator: By Erin Doherty

item.title: Where Democrats’ House primaries stand
item.description: Across at least 10 battleground House seats nationwide, Democrats are sitting with similar cash-on-hand totals.
item.dc:creator: By Andrew Howard

item.title: The big ads from the big game
item.description: While most ads were from the biggest companies in the world, some politicians, too, used the couch-heavy affair to promote their campaigns.
item.dc:creator: By Andrew Howard

item.title: 5 things we learned from the latest FEC drop
item.description: Candidates, committees and super PACs filed with the FEC on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: By Andrew Howard

item.title: Independents think it’s their year (again)
item.description: Two more independents — Alaska’s Bill Hill and Wisconsin’s Mike Thurow — launched campaigns last week.
item.dc:creator: By Andrew Howard
